_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Report on a periodic basis regarding the status of the privacy program to the Board, CEO or other responsible individual or committee.
reference_document_element_description: Report to the board, audit committee, and executive leadership on data and AI risk posture, program maturity, regulatory compliance status, and value realization.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-T-010 (DG, cosine: 0.506), RC-T-007 (RC, cosine: 0.459).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.525). Shared vocabulary: [board, committee, program, report, status]. DCWF-only terms [basis, ceo, individual, periodic, privacy, regarding] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, audit, compliance, data, executive, leadership] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.876 (P=0.874, R=0.877). Balanced P/R — the 22-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Report on a periodic basis regarding the status of the privacy program to the Bo" and "Report to the board, audit committee, and executive leadership on data and AI ri" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.527 ≈ STS 0.525 (gap 0.002). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [board, committee, program, report, status] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 25.0%. Shared tokens: [board, committee, program, report, status]. DCWF-only: [basis, ceo, individual, periodic, privacy, regarding]. WIDAI-only: [ai, audit, compliance, data, executive, leadership].
